text: So you might have heard about this new role that is known as forward deployed engineer. So some of you are saying that you're forward deployed engineer role So this is a new role in the AI era to board traction pocket and it is a highly paid role and this particular role is a specialized customer facing role. That means you as a developer have to act between the bridge between the companies and the business and you have to solve a use case for them and you have to build products for them. Now here is a practical example. Let's say you are working for open AI and open AI is expert in building these LLM models, right? But the problem is that the end businesses don't know how to use these models and there is no way that you can just use these models as a raw format. I just charge GPT to talk to my business and use it. You have to build a layer on top of it. You have to identify the problem. You have to identify my whole business and how to use LLM. How to use AI to power and how you can increase the efficiency of my business. You have to build AI workflows on top of it. You have to build AI agentic frameworks on top of it. You have to deploy agents. So you have to do all these things and you have this particular role that is a forward deployed engineer. So if you're working for open AI, so open AI can help you with your customer. Let's say your customer is Starbucks. So you have to analyze Starbucks and how they work. How they do their daily routine. How they do their inventory management. And you have to figure out how to use LLM and deploy it in their whole business and how to use AI to help them. You have to build full stack applications. You have to build AI agents. You have to build agentic workflows. Deploy for them. You have to build tools so that Starbucks and open AI can have a B2B deal. So this is basically the role of a forward deployed engineer. This particular role you should have strong technical skills, full stack building capabilities and you should be open-minded to understand the business. How business works, your communication skills. So, this is actually a very specialized role and this is the new role which is a very hot in the AI era.
